name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: What a blessing to wake up to your words of Thanksgiving.. We serve a mighty God and you always give us this reminder. May God continue to bless Lyla and her BEAUTIFUL family.

name: Stephanie Heston
body: Sending thoughts to your family. Remember, sometimes, one day at a time, one hour at a time, one minute at a time, is enough. Do what you can. ❤️‍🩹 God has a purpose in all of this, but that may be hard to see right now. Cling tight to Him & each other.

name: Charlie Pagnard
body: Praying for Lyla today and every day!!

name: Andrea VanSchepen
body: Sending prayers of comfort and indescribable peace your way. Love you guys. What a journey you continue to trek on … your perspective and heart are inspiring. No doubt that God is using both Lyla’s life and your family’s story. Thank you for always being so vulnerable and raw… never afraid to be real about the wrestling and difficulty - but constantly choosing HOPE and CONFIDENCE in Christ. ❤️

name: Renee Runyon
body: I'm praying right now during surgery. May God fill the surgical suite and the waiting room with His unmistakable fragrance of peace!

name: Chris Hale
body: You have a Beautiful way of expressing yourself… the Whole Texas Delegation are continuing to Pray for the Whole Family…

name: Graham Geisler
body: Those are powerful words, brother. I'll be praying for you all today.

name: Tina Hurst
body: Praying for Lyla and the rest of you today. May God guide the surgeons, give peace to replace the anxiety, and may her health be 100% restored. In Jesus’ precious and powerful name. Amen! Thank you for sharing this journey and allowing us to kneel at the feet of Jesus with you!

name: Damien Beauford
body: Praying for you all. God is so good even now.

name: Judy Nichols
body: Praying for Lyla. And for all of you. God is good.

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Praying all of you feel God's love and strength tomorrow and always.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Lifting you all to the throne room and praying for miracles!
